test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for additive scope: tactical tests rebuilt and passed (OK (76 tests)); adapter coverage checks interface shape, guarded modal behavior, standalone compilation, preserved winner semantics, and absence of runtime rewiring.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, and doc/DesignNotes.md describe ITacticalUI/WXTacticalUI as additive Milestone 6 infrastructure and explicitly defer runtime tactical delegation rewiring to Milestone 7.
